text.title: GitLab Issue Boards Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the GitLab Issue Boards methodology end-to-end.

step.name: agree-label-scheme
step.action: Agree workflow / priority / type scoped-label sets in a 30-min meeting.

step.name: seed-labels
step.action: Run seed_labels.py with the project id; idempotent.
step.decision-gate: If any label fails to create, halt and inspect.

step.name: build-boards
step.action: Configure board columns from workflow labels; add WIP limits per column.

step.name: write-policy-readme
step.action: Document entry/exit criteria per column; link from board description.

step.name: install-issue-templates
step.action: Commit .gitlab/issue_templates/Bug.md and Feature.md; train team on use.
